brand.name: Anamata Kāhui
brand.tagline: He papaho hapori e whakakotahi ana i ngā pūkōrero, rangahau, toi auaha, me te hangarau mō Aotearoa.

home.lede: Ko Anamata Kāhui te papaho hapori e whakakotahi ana i Anamata Records, te Rangatiratanga Reo me te Rangahau, te Toi Auaha, me te Hangarau. He mea hanga mā ngā kaiwaiata, kaimātai, kiritaki hoki e hiahia ana kia kotahi te wāhi — kia kaua hoki e kaiponutia.
home.branchesLede: He peka tō tēnā, ā, he taputapu, he papamahi anō — engari kotahi tonu te pūnaha takiuru, kotahi tonu te tauanga raraunga, kotahi tonu te tūāpapa ahurea.
home.closerTitle: I hanga ki Supabase + Next.js. I tukunga ki Vercel.
home.closerLede: Ko te RLS e whāiti ana i ia rēkōta ki tōna kaipupuri. Ko te mema peka e whakahaere ana i ngā papamahi e kitea ana e koe. Ka tere tonu ngā huarahi tūmatanui i te taha o te tihi Whatunga.
home.nzsISlot: Whakamāori NZSL — hei ā muri ake

records.name: Anamata Records
records.tagline: He peka puoro — tomokanga kaiwaiata, raupapatanga tukunga, putunga STEM, me ngā tatauranga tihi me te moni whakahoki.

artistPortal.title: Tomokanga kaiwaiata
artistPortal.body: Ka whakahaere ia kaiwaiata i tōna rōpere, ngā tukunga, me ngā moni whakahoki i tētahi wāhi kotahi.

releasePipeline.title: Raupapatanga tukunga
releasePipeline.body: Ka whai mai i tētahi tukunga mai i te hukihuki tae atu ki te tukunga kua whakaritea, ki ngā tatauranga muri-tukunga.

stemVault.title: Putunga STEM
stemVault.body: He putunga haumaru, he putunga putanga mō ngā mastatī, ngā STEM, me ngā toi tautoko.

streamRoyalty.title: Tihi me te Moni
streamRoyalty.body: Ngā tatauranga mahi mai i Spotify, Apple Music, me ngā kaiwhakaputa kiritaki.

research.name: Rangatiratanga Reo me te Rangahau
research.tagline: He pouaka mātauranga, he puna kōnae, he kaupapa ā-whenua mō te whakapūmau i te reo.

documentVault.title: Pouaka kōnae
documentVault.body: He puna kōnae rapu mō ngā pūtake taketake, ngā tuhituhi, me ngā tuhipoka ā-whenua.

fieldProjects.title: Kaupapa ā-whenua
fieldProjects.body: He kaiwhakahaere ora mō ngā mahi ā-whenua e haere ana, me ngā raraunga kaitiaki.

languageTools.title: Taputapu reo
languageTools.body: He taputapu kupu Māori — oropuare, auau, me ngā tohu reo-ā-iwi.

publications.title: Ngā whakaputa
publications.body: Ngā tuhinga kua arotakea me ngā tuhinga hapori, me te whakapiri DOI.

arts.name: Toi Auaha
arts.tagline: He toi ā-kanohi, he whakaaturanga pāpāho matihiko, me ngā kōpaki hoahoa ahurea.

galleries.title: Ngā whare toi
galleries.body: He kohinga kua kōhukihia o ngā mahi ā-kanohi — taumira teitei, he kōrero tautoko hoki.

digitalMedia.title: Pāpāho matihiko
digitalMedia.body: Ngā mahi auaha, nekeneke, tauwhitiwhiti, e tukunga ana i te taha o te tihi Whatunga.

portfolios.title: Ngā kōpaki
portfolios.body: He kōpaki mō ia kaitoi, me te whakapapa me ngā hītori whakaaturanga.

commissions.title: Ngā tono
commissions.body: He kaiwhakawhiwhi tono, kaiwhakahaere kaupapa hoki mō ngā mahi i tonoa.

dev.name: Hangarau me te Whakawhanake
dev.tagline: He kaupapa pūmanawa, he taputapu kiritaki, me ngā mahi aunoa ā-roto mō te Kāhui.

clientTools.title: Taputapu kiritaki
clientTools.body: Ngā papamahi me ngā taputapu i hanga mō ngā hoa mahi o te Kāhui.

openSource.title: Pūmanawa tuwhera
openSource.body: Ngā wharepukapuka me ngā tīmatanga e tukunga ana i raro i ngā raihana atawhai.

automation.title: Mahi aunoa
automation.body: Ngā tuhinga ā-roto me ngā raina mō ngā mahi kōpaki, tukunga, me ngā tatauranga.

apiConsole.title: Tauranga API
apiConsole.body: He huarahi whakamana mō te whakahaere i ngā ki API me ngā huna tūhono.

about.title: Mō Anamata Kāhui
about.lede: Ko Anamata Kāhui te tātai matihiko e kawe ana i a Anamata Records, te Rangatiratanga Reo me te Rangahau, te Toi Auaha, me te Hangarau i raro i tētahi tuanui kotahi. He peka tō tēnā, ā, he papamahi, he taputapu anō — engari kotahi tonu te pūnaha takiuru, kotahi tonu te tauanga raraunga, kotahi tonu te tūāpapa ahurea.

tino.title: Tino rangatiratanga
tino.body: He tino rangatiratanga i ia taumata — ka mahi te papaho mō ngā tāngata e hanga ana, kaua mōna anō.

kaitiaki.title: Kaitiakitanga
kaitiaki.body: Ka whakahaerehia ngā raraunga ahurea e ngā hapori nō reira. Ko te RLS, ngā raraunga whakaaetanga, me ngā huarahi tātari ka whakarae.

whanaunga.title: Whanaungatanga
whanaunga.body: Ka tiria e ngā peka e whā tētahi tuakiri, tētahi pūnaha takiuru, me tētahi tikanga whakahaere. Kāore rātou e tū wehe.

about.getInvolvedLede: Ahakoa he kaiwaiata, he kaimātai, he kaihoahoa, he kaipūmanawa rānei — he wāhi tōu i te Kāhui.

contact.title: Whakapā
contact.lede: Tukua mai tētahi kōrero. Ka whakautu mātou i roto i ētahi rā mahi.
contact.cardLede: Mō te raihana, ngā mahi tahi, ngā pātai whānui rānei.
contact.name: Ingoa

footer.tagline: He papaho hapori e whakakotahi ana i ngā pūkōrero, rangahau, toi auaha, me te hangarau mō Aotearoa.
footer.copyright: Ngā motika katoa e rāhiritia ana.

login.title: Takiuru
login.lede: Uru ki te tomokanga kaiwaiata, ngā papamahi, me te tauranga Kāhui.

register.title: Hono mai ki te Kāhui
register.lede: Waihangahia tētahi pūkete kia uru ai ki te tomokanga kaiwaiata me ngā papamahi.

reset.title: Tautuhi anō i te kupuhipa
reset.lede: Ka tukuna mātou i tētahi hononga whakaora ki tō īmēra.

cookieConsent.title: Pihikete i tēnei pae
cookieConsent.body: Ka whakamahi mātou i ngā pihikete tino hiahiatia kia pai ai te mahi a te pae, me ngā pihikete tātaritanga whiriwhiri hei mōhio ki te āhua o tōna whakamahi. Ka taea e koe te whakaae ki ngā mea katoa, te whakakore i ngā mea kāore e tino hiahiatia, te whakarite rānei.
cookieConsent.reject: Whakakore i ngā mea kāore e tino hiahiatia

necessary.label: Tino hiahiatia
necessary.description: E hiahiatia ana kia pai ai te mahi a te pae. Kare e taea te weto.

analytics.label: Tātaritanga
analytics.description: Āwhina i a mātou kia mōhio ki te āhua o te whakamahi i te pae. Kua weto i te tīmatanga.

preferences.label: Ngā kōwhiringa
preferences.description: Maumahara ki tō reo me ngā tautuhinga e wātea ana.

privacyNotice.title: Whakaatu tūmataitinga
privacyNotice.summary: Ka whakamārama tēnei whakaatu i te āhua o tō Anamata Kāhui kohikohi, pupuri, whakamahi, me te whakapuaki i ō mōhiohio whaiaro i raro i te Ture Tūmataitinga 2020. Ka whakanuihia hoki e mātou ngā mātāpono CARE o Te Mana Raraunga Māori Data Sovereignty. Kei raro te tuhinga katoa i te reo Pākehā; ka whai mai he whakarāpopototanga reo Māori i muri i te ripanga ihirangi.
privacyNotice.tocWhy: He aha i kohikohi ai mātou
privacyNotice.tocHow: Me pēhea tā mātou pupuri, tiaki

cookiePolicy.title: Kaupapa here pihikete
cookiePolicy.summary: Ka whakarārangi tēnei kaupapa here i ia pihikete ka tautuhia e anamatakahui.co.nz, tāna mahi, te roa o tōna oranga, me te āhua e taea ai e koe te whakahaere. Kei raro te kaupapa here katoa i te reo Pākehā; ka whakamārama te whakarāpopototanga reo Māori i ngā kaupapa matua.

terms.title: Ngā here whakamahi
terms.summary: Ka whakahaeretia e ēnei here te whakamahi i anamatakahui.co.nz me ngā peka e whā. Mā te whakamahi i te pae ka whakaae koe ki ēnei here. Kei raro ngā here katoa i te reo Pākehā; ka whakamārama te whakarāpopototanga reo Māori i ngā kaupapa matua.

anonymous.title: Ngā mana tūmataitinga
anonymous.lede: Takiuru kia kite i ō raraunga, tono kia tangohia, tono kia mukua, panoni rānei i tō whakaaturanga whaiaro i te kōpaki.

dataExport.title: Tangohia ō raraunga
dataExport.description: Tikiake he kape o ō raraunga pūkete — kōtaha, whakaaturanga whaiaro i te kōpaki, ngā pātai whakapā, me ngā tāurunga rangapū whakaae.

dataDeletion.title: Tono kia mukua te pūkete
dataDeletion.description: Tāpaehia he tono kia mukua tō pūkete. Ka whakaū mātou mā īmēra i mua i te mukunga.

directory.title: Whakaaturanga i te kōpaki whaiaro
directory.description: Ka kitea pea tō kōtaha i te kōpaki whaiaro o te Kāhui (mō ngā kaiwaiata, kaiwhakangungu, kaihoahoa). Tahuri whakaweto kia tangohia koe.
directory.optedIn: E whakaaturia ana i te kōpaki whaiaro

cookies.title: Ngā kōwhiringa pihikete
cookies.description: Whakahoutia tō whakaae mō te tātaritanga me ngā pihikete kōwhiringa.

notFound.title: Kāore i kitea te whārangi
notFound.description: Kāore i te whārangi i rapu ai koe, kua nekehia rānei.

generic.title: Hē tētahi mea
generic.description: I pā mai tētahi hē ohorere. Kua whakamōhio mātou. Tēnā whakamātau anō.

research.title: Rangahau me te Reo
research.lede: Rangahau reo Māori, kaupapa ā-papa, me te taha whakawhiti kōrero e wātea ana ki te iwi whānui.

forFunders.title: Mā ngā Kaitautoko
forFunders.lede: Mā ngā tāngata, ngā rōpū hoki e whakatau ana me whakataetae i te Anamata Kāhui. He taunakitanga ora, he hurihuri tahua e mahi ana, me te tūmanako ahurea-kaitiakitanga e whakaiti i te tūraru.

waiata.title: Anamata Records
waiata.lede: Te peka puoro — ngā waiata kua tukua, ngā kaiwaiata, te pūranga tuaka, me ngā tātaritanga.

kaikorero.title: Kōtahitanga Kaikōrero
kaikorero.subtitle: Tō matawhenua mātauranga
kaikorero.lede: Kōrerohia ngā mea e mōhio ana koe, me te iwi, rohe rānei e pūtake ana tō mātauranga. Ka kitea ai koe e ngā kaihanga Māori puta noa i ngā iwi mō te mahi ngātahi. Ko koe tonu te kaitiaki o ngā mea e whakaaturia ana ki te iwi whānui.
kaikorero.directoryLede: Ngā mema o te kāhui e kawe ana i te mātauranga ahurea puta noa i ngā iwi. Ko te kite ka mahi mā te kōwhiri — kimi i te tangata e kawe ana i ngā pūrākau, i te reo, i te tikanga e hiahia ana koe, hāngai ki te iwi, rohe rānei e tika ana tōna mana.

sections.bioHelp: Te kōrero whānui mō tō kaikōrero. Kupu noa iho; ka whakaaturia ki tō whārangi kaikōrero mēnā kua whakaaturia.
sections.iwiHelp: He kī nāu anō. Ka wehe mai i ngā iwi kua whakamana (kaitiaki rōpū, whakamana rānei e te mema kua whakamana).
sections.knowledgeAreasHelp: Ngā mea e mōhio ana koe. Ka taea te hāngai ki tētahi iwi, rohe rānei (hei tauira, ngā pūrākau o Ngāti Porou).
sections.visibilityHelp: He kōwhiri ōu e rua. Kia whakaaturia ki te iwi whānui, me whakahohe hoki te kōwhiri kaiwhakauru ki te rārangi tūmatanui.

fields.bioPlaceholder: Kōrerohia ki ētahi atu kaihanga ngā mea e mōhio ana koe, i hea koe i ahu mai ai, me ngā mahi e ngākaunui ana koe ki te mahi ngātahi.
fields.bioHint: Kia tae ki te 2000 pūāhua. Kāore e pā ki tō kōrero kaiwhakamahi o mua.
fields.iwiPlaceholder: hei tauira, Ngāti Porou, Ngāi Tahu
fields.iwiHint: Ka whakaaturia ngā iwi kī-taketahi me te tohu "kī-taketahi". Ko ngā iwi kua whakamana ka whakaaturia hei iwi noa iho.
fields.duplicateHint: Ka taea te tāpiri i te wāhanga kotahi i ngā wā maha mēnā e hāngai ana ki ngā iwi, rohe rerekē.
fields.visibilityPublic: Whakamahia tō ingoa ki te rārangi kaikōrero tūmatanui
fields.visibilityPublicHelp: Me whakahohe hoki te kōwhiri rārangi tūmatanui i ngā tautiakitanga tūmataiti.
fields.availableForTonoHelp: Whiwhi tono āwhina mai i ētahi atu kaihanga. Ka taea te whakaweto mō tētahi wā me te kaua e huna i tō kōtahitanga.
fields.emptyAreas: Kāore anō ngā wāhanga mātauranga — tāpirihia mai i raro nei.

kaikorero.publicNotVisible: Kāore i te whakaaturia ki te iwi whānui ināianei. Kia whakaaturia ai koe ki te rārangi kaikōrero me whakahohe kōtahi te kōtahitanga nei me te kōwhiri rārangi tūmatanui.

directory.filterHelp: E whakaatu ana i ngā kaikōrero ka tutaki ō rātou wāhanga mātauranga ki te tātari. Ko te kite ka mahi mā te tātari — kāore he tatau huinga, kāore he raupapa.
directory.noResultsFiltered: Kāore he kaikōrero e tutaki ana ki ēnei tātari. Whakamatau ki te whakawhānui i te rapu iwi, tangohia rānei te tātari wāhanga.
directory.noResultsEmpty: Kāore anō he kōtahitanga kua whakaaturia ki te iwi whānui. Ka taea e ngā mema te whakahohe mā te kaiwhakatika kōtahitanga kaikōrero i te papamahi.

profilePage.collaboratePrompt: E hiahia ana koe ki te mahi ngātahi?
profilePage.collaborateBody: Ka taea e ngā mema o te kāhui te tuku tono āwhina, hāngai ki te wāhanga ahurea e hiahia tautoko ana. Ka whakaaturia tēnei kaikōrero hei kaitono — ka mahia te mahi ngātahi i waho i te papaho, i te papamahi rānei, kaua i te karere tūturu.
profilePage.collaborateNote: Ka tae mai te papa tono ki te Wāhanga 3 (kōtahi nei te tukunga: kōtahitanga me te kite).

messages.savedPublic: Kua tiakina te kōtahitanga. Kua whakamahia tō ingoa ki te rārangi kaikōrero tūmatanui.
messages.savedPrivate: Kua tiakina te kōtahitanga. Kua hunaia i te rārangi tūmatanui.
messages.nowPublic: Kua whakaaturia tō kōtahitanga ki te iwi whānui.
messages.bioTooLong: Kia 2000 pūāhua, neke atu rānei, tō roa o te kōrero.
messages.parseFailed: Kāore i taea te whakamāori i ngā wāhanga mātauranga. Whakamatau anō.
messages.saveProfileFailed: Kāore i taea te tiaki i te kōtahitanga: {message}
messages.clearFailed: Kāore i taea te ūkui i ngā wāhanga mātauranga o mua: {message}
messages.knowledgeFailed: Kāore i taea te tiaki i ngā wāhanga mātauranga: {message}
messages.visibilityFailed: Kāore i taea te whakahou i te whakaaturanga: {message}

errors.profileNotFoundDesc: Kāore i te tū te rō kaiwhakamahi. Whakapā ki te kaiwhakahaere mō te whakauru.

roster.title: Taku rōpū
roster.lede: Tirohia tō tūranga i ia peka e whakakītia nei koe. He tirohanga anake tēnei — kāore e taea te huri i konei.
roster.emptyTitle: Kāore koe i te rōpū mō tēnei peka
roster.emptyBody: Ki te hiahia koe kia whakaurua ki tētahi peka, tēnā whakapā mai ki tētahi kaiwhakahaere.
roster.infoBody: Ka whakaaturia tō tūranga i ia peka e whai ana koe. Ko ngā kaiwhakahaere anake ka taea te huri i te tūranga me te tūmataitinga.
roster.signLede: Kua pānuitia e koe ngā tikanga katoa, ā, kua whakaae koe ki ngā kupu o tēnei kirimana.

policies.acknowledgeLede: Kua pānuitia e koe ngā tikanga katoa, ā, kua whakaae koe ki ngā kupu o tēnei kaupapa here.
policies.notesPlaceholder: Hei tauira: Kua aro ahau ki te wāhanga 3, engari ka whakaae
policies.notesHint: Ka whakaaturia tō tuhipoka ki a koutou ko ngā kaiwhakahaere.
policies.withdrawLede: Ka noho tonu te whakamana tuatahi i roto i ngā mahi tātari. Mēnā ka tiki atu koe, ka kitea tō tūmanako, engari kāore koe e kī ana kua whakaae tonu koe.
policies.withdrawReasonPlaceholder: He aha i tiki atu ai koe? (he kōwhiringa)
policies.withdrawReasonHint: Ka whakamahia tēnei hei whakapā atu mēnā ka huri te kaupapa here.

demos.title: Aku tārua
demos.lede: Ngā tārua (he mahi kāore anō i tū hei tukunga). Tukua he tārua mō te arotake tikanga i mua i tō hokinga mai hei tukunga tūmata.
demos.emptyTitle: Kāore koe i te rōpū mō tēnei peka
demos.emptyBody: Kōrero ki tētahi kaiwhakahaere kia tāpirihia koe ki te rōpū i mua i tō tukunga i ngā tārua.
demos.uploadLede: Whakakīia ngā taipitopito. Ka tukuna tō kōnae ki te rokiroki i mua i te tāke i tēnei puka.
demos.noDemosYet: Kāore anō he tārua kia tukua.
demos.submitConfirmLede: Ka kitea tēnei tārua e ngā kaitiaki. Ka whakamohiohia koe mēnā ka whakaaetia, whakakorehia rānei.
demos.approveConfirmLede: Mā tēnei ka tuku i te tārua kia whakatairangatia hei tukunga tūmata (i muri i te whakatairanga a te kaiwhakahaere).
demos.rejectConfirmLede: Ko tēnei te whakamutunga. Mēnā ka hiahia koe kia arotakehia anō, tāpirihia he tārua hou.
demos.promoteConfirmLede: Ka waihangatia he tukunga hou i runga i tēnei tārua. Ka whakakorehia te tārua.
demos.promoteNotesPlaceholder: He aha tēnei tukunga e pā ana ki?
demos.errorBadMime: Ko te momo kōnae "{type}" kāore e whakaaetia.
demos.errorTooLarge: He rahi rawa te kōnae ({size}). Ko te mōrahi mō tēnei momo ko {limit}.
demos.errorRateLimit: He maha rawa ngā tukunga. Tēnā tatari kia mātoru meneti ka ngana anō.
demos.errorQuota: Kua hipa i tō kaha rokiroki, kaha tārua rānei.
demos.errorDemoLimit: Kua tae atu koe ki te mōrahi tārua. Mukua ētahi tārua tārai, tāka hoki rānei mō te arotake kia wātea ai he wāhi.

endorsements.title: Ngā whakamana
endorsements.subtitle: Kōtahitanga koha
endorsements.lede: Ko ngā whakamana te paparanga whakapono o te kāhui. I ia whakamana ka whāngaihia ki tētahi mahi, tētahi wāhanga, me (i ētahi wā) tētahi iwi. Ka whakaaturia ki tō kōtahitanga kaikōrero tūmatanui kia kitea ai koe e ngā kaihanga Māori puta noa i ngā iwi mō te mahi ngātahi.

given.empty: Kāore anō koe i hoatu i tētahi whakamana.
given.revokePlaceholder: Ka kitea e te kaiwhiwhi, ā, ki tō kōtahitanga tūmatanui. Kia tino hira — he wāhanga tēnei nō te whakapapa ahurea.

received.empty: Kāore anō koe i whiwhi whakamana. Kia whakamana tētahi kaitiaki i tētahi tukunga i mahi ngātahitia e koe, ka kitea he whakamana-aunoa i konei.

lineage.title: Kōtahitanga koha
lineage.subtitle: I ia whakamana ka whāngaihia ki tētahi mahi, ā, (ki reira) ki tētahi wāhanga mātauranga, iwi hoki. Ko te tino tikanga kaua e whakaatu i te tapeke.

messages.revokeSuccess: Kua whakakorehia te whakamana. Ka whakaaturia ki te kōtahitanga o te kaiwhiwhi me tō take.
messages.selfEndorse: Kāore e taea te whakamana i a koe anō.
messages.notesRequired: E hiahiatia ana ngā tuhipānui (1–2000 pūāhua).
messages.profileWorkConflict: Kāore ngā whakamana kōtahitanga e whakaae i tētahi work_id.
messages.workRequired: Me pānui ki tētahi mahi ngā whakamana ehara i te kōtahitanga noa iho.
messages.recipientNotFound: Kāore i kitea te kōtahitanga kaiwhiwhi.
messages.insertFailed: Kāore i taea te tuhi whakamana: {message}
messages.revokeIdRequired: E hiahiatia ana te id whakamana.
messages.revokeReasonRequired: E hiahiatia ana te take whakakorenga (1–2000 pūāhua).
messages.revokeFailed: Kāore i taea te whakakore i te whakamana: {message}

errors.emptyDesc: Ka tae mai ngā whakamana ina whakamana tētahi kaitiaki i tētahi tukunga i mahi ngātahitia e koe. Ka taea hoki te hoatu whakamana ā-ringa mai i tētahi kōtahitanga kaikōrero tūmatanui.

fields.workTypeHelp: Mā te tautoko i te tangata tonu, waiho ko 'Kaikoerero tonu'. Mā te tautoko i tētahi mahi motuhake, kĳia mai i raro.
fields.domain: Mātauranga e hāngai ana (kāore i whiriwhiria)
fields.notesPlaceholder: He aha tēnei tangata nāna te mātauranga? He aha i tautoko ai koe? Ka noho tēnei hei wāhi o te whakapapa.
fields.notesHelp: Ka whakaaturia te kōpū ki te kaiwhakawhiti me te iwi tōhiko o te whakamana.

give.publicNote: Kua whakamana koe i tēnei kaikōrero. Whakahaerehia āu whakamana i tāu papa whakamana.

board.title: Ngā tono
board.subtitle: Papa tono
board.lede: Tukua he tono ina hiahiatia koe he āwhina ahurea puta i ngā iwi — te manatū pūrākau, te arotake reo, te tautoko, he kaihoe rānei mō tētahi tukunga. Ka kitea e ētahi atu kaikōrero tō tono, ā, ka taea e rātou te tono.
board.noActiveDesc: Tukua mai ina hiahiatia he āwhina ahurea mō tētahi mahi kei te haere.
board.openInboxLabel: Ngā tono tuwhera ka taea e koe te āwhina

compose.title: Tono āwhina ki te kāhui
compose.lede: Tukua he tono āwhina e whāngaihia ana ki tētahi momo mātauranga ahurea, (he kōwhiri) ki tētahi iwi hoki. Ka kitea e ngā kaikōrero kawe i taua mātauranga, ā, ka taea e rātou te tono.
compose.scopeRegionPlaceholder: hei tauira, te rohe o Te Whanganui-a-Tara
compose.requestItselfDesc: Kia tino hira tāu e hiahia ana. Ka pānuitia e ētahi atu kaikōrero ki te whakatau mēnā ka tono rātou.
compose.requestBodyPlaceholder: Kei te mahi au i tētahi waiata e pūtake ana i ngā pūrākau o Ngātoroirangi, ā, e hiahia ana au kia tētahi tangata nō Taranaki ki te manatū i ngā tohutoro wāhi. Kei te tīmatanga te waiata nei.
compose.kohaDesc: Tāu e hoatu ana hei utu. He taonga tiriti, he koha ā-mua, he moni, he kore rānei mēnā ko te hononga tonu te koha. Kia tika — kāore te pūnaha e whakahaere i tāu e tuhi nei, engari ko tō mana ahurea e pūtake ana i tēnei.
compose.kohaPlaceholder: hei tauira, taonga tiriti ki te waiata, koha ā-mua, $300, kore rānei — ko te hononga tonu
compose.kohaMonetary: He koha moni tēnei (kia tohua e te atanga)
compose.visibilityDesc: Ka waiata ka kite i tēnei tono. Ko te taunoa ko 'tuwhera'; ko te 'iwi whāiti' e whāiti ana ki ngā kaikōrero kua whakamana ki te iwi ka tautapa.
compose.anchorReleaseDesc: Mēnā e pā ana tēnei tono ki tētahi tukunga motuhake, tūhono ki konei. Ka puta te tono ki te whārangi o tērā tukunga ina oti.
compose.iwiSpecificHelp: Me whakakī i te scope_iwi i runga nei.

detail.noLongerOpen: Kāore e whakaae ana i ngā tono hou
detail.pendingDesc: E tatari ana kia whakautu te kaihanga tono.
detail.acceptedDesc: Kua whakaaetia! Kua whiti ki te kōrerorero. Tatari kia tohua e te kaihanga kua oti.
detail.declinedDesc: Kua whakakorehia e te kaihanga tono.
detail.withdrawnDesc: I tangohia e koe tēnei tono.

proposal.title: Tono āwhina
proposal.lede: Ka kitea e te kaihanga tono tō tono, ā, ka taea e ia te whakaae, te whakakore rānei. Mēnā ka whakaaetia, ka neke te tono ki te kōrerorero; ka oti te mahi, ka whakamana i a koe.
proposal.yourProposalPlaceholder: Whakamāramatia tāu e kawe ana, me pēhea. Kia hira te kōrero mō te whānui me te wā.
proposal.declineReasonPlaceholder: Ka kitea e te kaitono. Ka puritia te whakapapa ahurea.
proposal.endorsementNote: Ka whakamana-aunoa tō kaihoe hei kaihanga-nui mō te tukunga kua tūhona (mēnā he tukunga). Ka pānuitia rātou.
proposal.fulfilling: E whakatutuki ana i tēnei tono
proposal.proposedKohaPlaceholder: Tāu e whakaae ai hei utu. Kaitiakitanga ā-mua, taonga tiriti, moni whakatika, kore rānei.

lifecycle.title: Mahi kōtaha
lifecycle.description: Nekehia te tono ki tōna tū whakamutunga. Whakamana ina tutuki te mahi; tangohia mēnā kua kore e tika ana te tono; katia mēnā kāore koe e whakatutuki.
lifecycle.closeWarning: Ko te kati kāore i te whakatutuki ka whakakore i ngā tono tuwhera. Ka kitea e te kaitono kua whakaaetia tēnei.
lifecycle.notePlaceholder: hei tauira, I tukua 'Te Tinihanga' i te 2026-09-12, ka tino tau tō ārahi ki te piriti.
lifecycle.withdrawReason: He aha i tangohia ai? Ka whakakorehia ngā tono tuwhera me tēnei take.
lifecycle.closeReason: He aha i katia ai kāore i te whakatutuki?

inbox.title: Ngā tono āwhina ka taea e koe te whakautu
inbox.lede: Ngā tono tuwhera huri noa i te kāhui. Kua tātarihia mā tō iwi whakamana — ka puta noa i ngā tono iwi-whāiti mēnā kei roto i tō huinga whakamana te iwi kua tonoa.
inbox.emptyTitle: Ko te pouaka tono e pau ana
inbox.emptyDesc: Kāore he tono tuwhera e tutaki ana ki tō whakaaturanga. Hoki mai ā muri ake, toro atu rānei ki te rārangi kaikōrero kia kitea he tangata hei mahi ngātahi.

visibility.openHelp: Ka taea e ngā kaikōrero katoa i runga i te papaho te kite, te tono.
visibility.invitedHelp: Ko ngā kaikōrero ka karangatia motuhake e koe anake ka kite.
visibility.iwiSpecificHelp: Ko ngā kaikōrero kua whakamana ki te iwi ka tautapa e koe anake ka kite.

messages.createdOpen: Kua tukua te tono, ā, e whakaaturia ana ki te kāhui.
messages.createdIwi: Kua tukua te tono. Ka whakaaturia ki ngā kaikōrero kua whakamana ki tēnei iwi.
messages.createdInvited: Kua tukua te tono. Tāpirihia ngā manuhiri hei tohutohu.
messages.proposed: Kua tukua te tono. Ka kitea e te kaihanga tono, ā, ka taea te whakaae, te whakakore rānei.
messages.proposalAccepted: Kua whakaaetia te tono. Kua whiti ki te kōrerorero. Whakamana ina oti te mahi.
messages.proposalDeclined: Kua whakakorehia te tono. Kua pānuitia te kaitono.
messages.fulfilled: Kua oti te tono. Kua pānuitia te kaitono.
messages.fulfilledWithEndorsement: Kua oti te tono. Kua whakamana tō kaihoe mō tēnei mahi, ā, kua pānuitia rātou.
messages.withdrawn: Kua tangohia te tono. Kua whakakorehia ngā tono tuwhera, ā, kua tuhia te take.
messages.closed: Kua katia te tono. Kua whakakorehia ngā tono tuwhera.
messages.createFailed: Kāore i taea te tuku tono: {message}
messages.invalidBody: E hiahiatia ana te kōrero tono (1–4000 pūāhua).
messages.iwiSpecificRequiresScope: Ko te iwi_whāiti e hiahia ana i tētahi scope_iwi.
messages.kohaTooLong: Kia 2000 pūāhua, neke atu rānei, te roa o te koha.
messages.tonoIdRequired: E hiahiatia ana te id tono.
messages.proposalIdRequired: E hiahiatia ana te id tono.
messages.declineReasonTooLong: Kia 2000 pūāhua, neke atu rānei, te take whakakorenga.
messages.proposalTonoMissing: Kāore te tono o te tono i te tū.
messages.notCreator: Ko te kaihanga tono anake ka whakautu i ngā tono.
messages.tonoNotAccepting: Kāore te tono e whakaae ana i ngā whakautu.
messages.proposalUpdateFailed: Kāore i taea te whakahou i te tono: {proposalUpdateFailed}
messages.proposalAcceptedButTonoFailed: I whakaaetia te tono engari i rahua te whakahou tūnga tono: {message}. Whakamatau anō, whakapā rānei ki te kaiwhakahaere.
messages.selfPropose: Kāore e taea te tono ki tō ake tono.
messages.alreadyProposed: Kua tono kē koe ki tēnei tono. Tangohia tō tono o mua mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki te whakahou.
messages.proposeFailed: Kāore i taea te tuku tono: {message}
messages.tonoNotFound: Kāore i kitea, kāore rānei e kitea ana e koe.
messages.tonoNotAcceptingProposals: Kāore te tono e whakaae ana i ngā tono hou.
messages.cannotFulfillClosed: Kua {status} te tono — kāore e taea te whakatutuki.
messages.notCreatorLifecycle: Ko te kaihanga tono anake ka whakamana.
messages.cannotWithdrawFulfilled: Kāore e taea te tango i tētahi tono kua oti.
messages.notCreatorWithdraw: Ko te kaihanga tono anake ka tango.
messages.cannotCloseResolved: Kua {status} te tono — kāore e taea te kati.
messages.notCreatorClose: Ko te kaihanga tono anake ka kati.

empty.title: Kāore he pānui
empty.hint: Ka puta mai ngā pānui i te wā e pānui ana koe i te papamahi.

inbox.title: Ngā pānui katoa
inbox.subtitle: Ngā pānui
inbox.lede: Ngā whakamana kua riro, me ngā mahi tono puta noa i te kāhui. Ka kitea i konei.
inbox.emptyDescFilter: Kāore he pānui {{kind}}. Huri ki tētahi atu ripa.
inbox.emptyDescAll: Ka puta mai ngā whakamana me ngā mahi tono i konei.

messages.markedRead: Kua tohua te pānui kua pānuitia.
messages.markedAllRead: Kua tohua ngā pānui katoa kua pānuitia.
messages.markFailed: Kāore i taea te tohu pānui kua pānuitia: {{message}}
messages.markAllFailed: Kāore i taea te tohu pānui katoa kua pānuitia: {{message}}
messages.idRequired: E hiahiatia ana te id pānui.

prefs.title: Ngā manakohanga pānui
prefs.lede: Whiriwhiria ngā pānui e hiahia ana koe
prefs.description: Whakawetohia te whakawhitinga kōpū, ka whakahokia ngā tautuhinga ki te taumata taunoa.
prefs.inAppDesc: Ka puta te pānui i te pae tuhinga, ka kitea i te pane o mua.
prefs.emailDesc: Ka tukuna he īmēra tiri. Ka wātea ina whakamahia te Resend.

kindDesc.endorsement_received: Ka riro mai he whakamana mōhou i tētahi kaikōrero.
kindDesc.endorsement_revoked: Kua whakakorehia tētahi whakamana kua tukuna i mua.
kindDesc.tono_proposal_received: Kua tukuna he tono mōhou ki tētahi tono nāu.
kindDesc.tono_proposal_accepted: Kua whakaaetia tētahi tono nāu e te kaihanga.
kindDesc.tono_proposal_declined: Kua whakakorehia tētahi tono nāu e te kaihanga.
kindDesc.tono_fulfilled: Kua oti te tono i tautokona e koe.

prefs.culturalDesc: Ka whakaaetia tētahi tono, ka aunoa te hanga whakamana. Kōpū a te kaiwhakawhiti ka noho hei wāhi o te whakapapa. Ka whakaaehia pea tētahi whakamana, ka taea te whakakore mā te tūmanako.

records.createLede: Tīmataria he kaiwaiata, kaihaka, kaiwhakaari rānei ki te rōpū. Ka tīmata i te 'prospect' mā te taunoa.
records.roleSummaryPlaceholder: Hei tauira: Kaihaka matua, Anamata Records
records.onRosterPubliclyHint: Ka whakaaetia kia whakaturia tōna ingoa ki te rārangi kaitoi.
records.optedInPublicHint: Kua whakaae te kaitoi kia whakaaturia tōna whakapapa me ōna kōrero ki te iwi whānui.
records.internalNotesPlaceholder: Tuhipoka mō ngā kaiwhakahaere anake, kare e whakaaturia ki te kaitoi.
records.adminOnly: Ka kitea anake e ngā kaiwhakahaere.
records.noTransitionsAvailable: Karekau he whakawhitinga e wātea ana i tēnei tūranga.
records.visibilityLede: Me mātua whakaōrite ngā tohu e rua kia whakaaturia ki te iwi whānui.

contracts.createLede: Tīpakohia tētahi kaiwaiata, tētahi tuhinga, me ngā wā o te kirimana. Ka whakamaua te tuhinga i te wā e hangaia ana.
contracts.noRosterEntries: Kāore he kaiwaiata i te rōpū mō tēnei peka. Tāpiri tētahi i te tīmatanga.
contracts.territoryPlaceholder: Hei tauira: Aotearoa katoa, Ao whānui
contracts.exclusivityScopePlaceholder: Hei tauira: whakamana, kāore i whakamana

policies.title: Taitara
policies.lede: Ngā kaupapa here ā-ture mō te kāhui. Hangaia mai i te whare pukapuka tuhinga; ka whakamaua te tuhinga i te wā e hangaia ana.
policies.createLede: Kōwhiria te momo kaupapa here, te putanga mai i te whare pukapuka, me te rā e mana ai.
policies.requiredForAll: Hiahiatia kia whakamanahia e ngā kaiwaiata katoa
policies.noPolicies: Kāore anō kia hangaia he kaupapa here.

publicRoster.title: Ngā kaitoi i runga i te rōpū
publicRoster.lede: Ngā kaitoi kua tūmata ki ngā peka o Anamata Kāhui, ā, kua whakaae hoki rātou kia whakaaturia ki te iwi whānui.
publicRoster.noteBody: Ka whakaaturia tēnei rārangi i ngā kaitoi kua hainatia kia tūmata me ngā tikanga tūmata mō tēnei peka. Kāore e whakaaturia ngā kaitoi e kore e whakaae, ā, kāore hoki e whakaaturia ngā tūtohi, ngā taumata rānei — ko ngā ingoa me ngā tūrunga anake.
publicRoster.emptyTitle: Kāore anō he kaitoi tūmata mō tēnei peka
publicRoster.emptyBody: Mēnā ka hiahia koe kia tūmata, kōrero ki tētahi kaiwhakahaere.
